name: Greek Meatballs with Lemon Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Make the meatballs: In a medium bowl, combine beef, onion, rice, parsley, salt, and pepper with 1/4 cup cold water. Using your hands, mix well to combine.
2. Shape the mixture into meatballs, about 1 1/4 inches in diameter.
3. In a large pot, combine bouillon cubes, butter, and 4 cups water; bring to a boil.
4. Drop the meatballs one by one into the boiling liquid. Return to boiling; reduce heat, and simmer, covered, for 50 minutes.
5. Meanwhile, make the lemon sauce: In the top of a double boiler over hot (not boiling) water, using a rotary beater, beat eggs with 2 tbsp cold water until light and fluffy.
6. Remove 1/4 cup hot liquid from the pot; gradually add to egg mixture, beating constantly.
7. Gradually stir in lemon juice. Cook, stirring occasionally, until sauce thickens. Add salt. Remove from heat; let stand over hot water for 5 minutes before serving.
8. To serve: With a slotted spoon, remove meatballs to a serving dish. Pour the sauce over them. Sprinkle with chopped parsley. Serve the meatballs with cooked rice or mashed potatoes, if desired.
